name: Orbit B-hyve Smart Hose Watering Timer with WiFi Hub

specs.Smart Features: Scheduled watering, rain delay (smart + manual), weather intelligence
specs.Weather: Integrates with local weather station data for auto-skip on rain days

whatWorks: WiFi control from anywhere via the B-hyve app means you can start, stop, or adjust watering schedules from your phone while at work or on vacation — particularly valuable for Canadian cottage-season planning when you're away for weeks.
Smart weather delays automatically skip scheduled watering on rain days based on local forecast data — a genuine water-saving feature that many owners say pays for the timer in a single summer.
Alexa and Google Assistant integration enables voice control: 'Alexa, start watering the garden' works without opening the app. Setup is straightforward if you already have a smart home ecosystem.
Installation takes minutes on a standard 3/4" hose thread — no tools, no plumbing. Screw on, pair to the hub, and schedule from the app.
worthKnowing: Requires 2.4 GHz WiFi — does not work on 5 GHz networks. Many modern Canadian routers broadcast both bands under the same name, requiring you to split them or force a 2.4 GHz connection during setup.

Single zone only — one hose bib, one watering schedule. For properties with multiple hose connections or garden areas needing different schedules, multiple timers must be purchased and managed separately.
Battery-powered (4 AA batteries) — not wired. Battery life is approximately 12 months under typical use, but below-average Canadian winters may reduce this if the timer is left installed year-round.

Occasional app connectivity drops require re-pairing — a known issue in the B-hyve ecosystem that appears after firmware updates or router changes. Resolution is usually 5–10 minutes of troubleshooting.

commonComplaints.title: Only works on 2.4 GHz WiFi…
commonComplaints.body: Only works on 2.4 GHz WiFi — spent 45 minutes troubleshooting before realizing my router was broadcasting 2.4 and 5 GHz under the same name. Had to split the bands.

commonComplaints.title: App lost connection after a firmware…
commonComplaints.body: App lost connection after a firmware update. Had to delete and re-pair the device. Took about 10 minutes but it's happened twice now in two seasons.

commonComplaints.title: Single zone is limiting if you…
commonComplaints.body: Single zone is limiting if you have multiple garden areas. I ended up buying three of them which works but adds up quickly.

commonComplaints.title: Battery dies faster than expected if…
commonComplaints.body: Battery dies faster than expected if you leave it installed through a cold Canadian winter. Take it inside after the first frost.

verdict: The Orbit B-hyve Smart Hose Timer is the most practical smart watering solution for Canadian homeowners with a single-zone setup — weather-delay automation, away-from-home control, and Alexa/Google integration at $79 CAD. The 2.4 GHz WiFi requirement trips up modern dual-band routers during setup, and the single-zone limit requires multiple purchases for complex gardens. For a front or back garden with one hose bib, it's the right product. Take it inside before the Canadian winter to preserve battery and components.

realBuyers.quote: Went on a two-week vacation and didn't think once about watering. The timer ran every day on schedule and my garden was fine when I got back.
Smart rain delay saved me from watering the day before a huge rainstorm. Literally watches the forecast and cancels runs automatically.
Alexa turns on the garden watering when I ask. It's one of those smart home features that actually gets used every day.
Took ten minutes to install and set up the first schedule. Husband is not tech-savvy and he figured it out without help.

sources.title: Orbit B-hyve Smart Hose Timer — Amazon.ca

metaDescription: Orbit B-hyve smart hose watering timer review for Canada: WiFi + Bluetooth, weather-delay automation, Alexa/Google compatible. Honest on 2.4 GHz and single-zone limits. ~$79 CAD.
introText: The Orbit B-hyve Smart Hose Watering Timer connects to your home WiFi and automatically skips watering on rain days — controllable from anywhere via app or Alexa. Available on Amazon.ca (ASIN B07H9TGY7C) at around $79 CAD.
